mundo.titulo: Teacher who murdered adopted baby son Preston Davey given whole life prison sentence
mundo.resumen: Preston Davey died after months of sexual and physical abuse at the hands of Jamie Varley.

mundo.titulo: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
mundo.resumen: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.

mundo.titulo: First Russian shadow fleet tanker enters Channel since Smyrtos boarding
mundo.resumen: Forwarder, a Russian-flagged ship which left port in Primorsk last week, entered the Channel on Wednesday evening.

mundo.titulo: Young women now have 'close to zero' risk of cervical cancer death after HPV jab
mundo.resumen: A new study finds that hundreds of lives have been saved since school-age girls were offered the HPV jab in 2008.

mundo.titulo: 'My brother hid in a rice sack': The refugee stars playing at the World Cup
mundo.resumen: Germany's Antonio Rudiger, whose family fled Sierra Leone's civil war, is among those campaigning for a change in global attitudes.

mundo.titulo: Interest rates held as Bank warns of impact of high energy prices
mundo.resumen: The Bank last cut interest rates in December but upheaval in the Middle East has stalled any further reductions.

negocios.titulo: Interest rates held as Bank warns of impact of high energy prices
negocios.resumen: The Bank last cut interest rates in December but upheaval in the Middle East has stalled any further reductions.

negocios.titulo: Number of job vacancies hits five year-low
negocios.resumen: Latest figures suggest companies are becoming more cautious about taking on new staff.

negocios.titulo: Apple to raise prices as AI boom pushes up chip costs
negocios.resumen: The firm's outgoing boss Tim Cook did not say when prices would rise or which products would be affected.

negocios.titulo: Why has Texas set its sights on London?
negocios.resumen: Texas, which once had an embassy in London, strengthens its ties with the capital by opening a new trade office.

negocios.titulo: CrossCountry ranked Britain's worst train operator
negocios.resumen: Transport Focus asks it to reduce delays and provide better information during disruption.

negocios.titulo: 'We had to get out of the way': The backlash over delivery robots
negocios.resumen: As the delivery vehicles increasing take to US streets, bans and protest groups are springing up.

tecnologia.titulo: Spotify’s reserved ticket sales to music superfans are now going live
tecnologia.resumen: Spotify is launching "Reserved," a new system that will hold two concert tickets for an artist's superfans before they're on sale to the public.

tecnologia.titulo: Adobe adds its AI assistant to Premiere, Illustrator and InDesign
tecnologia.resumen: Adobe is updating its Firefly AI assistant with new chops, and adding it to Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign and Frame.io.

tecnologia.titulo: Pixi’s new iOS app turns text messages into interactive AR experiences
tecnologia.resumen: Forget stickers, GIFs, and emoji reactions. Pixi is betting that the next evolution of messaging is interactive augmented reality (AR).

tecnologia.titulo: Waymo recalls nearly 4,000 robotaxis to stop them driving into highway construction zones
tecnologia.resumen: The company has identified at least 13 instances where its robotaxis drove into highway sections closed for construction.

tecnologia.titulo: NASA picks Eric Schmidt’s rocket company for Mars mission, setting up a race with SpaceX
tecnologia.resumen: Relativity Space—a rocket maker acquired by former Google executive chair Eric Schmidt last year after stumbling on the path to orbit—might just beat SpaceX to Mars.

tecnologia.titulo: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
tecnologia.resumen: Here's what you need to do to get those pesky "write with Gemini" pop-ups to go away.

tecnologia.resumen: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. tecnologia.titulo: Who decides when AI is too dangerous?
tecnologia.resumen: On today’s episode of Decoder, my guest is Hayden Field, senior AI reporter for The Verge. Often when Hayden comes on the show, it’s because something has gone wrong in the world of AI. Last weekend, that something was a pretty intense mix of Anthropic, the Trump administration, and Anthropic’s new AI model, Fable 5.  […]

tecnologia.titulo: Amazon’s Kindle Colorsoft bundle is almost half off for Prime Day
tecnologia.resumen: Amazon’s Kindle Colorsoft Essentials Bundle is on sale for $182.97 (originally $334.97) as an early Prime Day deal, the lowest price we’ve seen for the combo. Unlike other Kindles, the Colorsoft’s color E Ink screen is great for comic books and graphics novels, illustrated books, or just perusing book covers while deciding what to read […]

tecnologia.titulo: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants

As part of a public beta launching today, Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io now each have a bespoke AI Assistant that can be used […]

tecnologia.titulo: Adobe’s redesigned AI studio remembers what your creations look like
tecnologia.resumen: Adobe is introducing some new capabilities for its Firefly AI assistant, alongside a "reimagined" AI studio that lets you edit and generate new designs from a single interface. The new Firefly experience launching today in private beta is designed to give you "persistent context, reusable assets, and organized workflows" across your projects, according to Adobe, […]

tecnologia.titulo: This Ghost in the Shell keyboard makes me want to activate the hundred spidery robot fingers inside my regular fingers
tecnologia.resumen: Anime collaborations are everywhere, from Gundam watches and Naruto nights at Major League ballparks to just about anything Evangelion. But these Ghost in the Shell keyboards from Iqunix are some of the coolest examples I've seen of anime-inspired everyday tech. They look sick and they type and play great.
